deals.Description: SolidWatts develops solid-state Radio Frequency (RF) platforms for industrial process heating, offering a clean and efficient alternative to fossil fuel-based systems. Their technology enables the electrification of industrial processes across diverse applications.
deals.Investors: Evercurious VC, Kickfund, Axel Carbon Capital, Uni. Fund, Investing for Purpose, Loggerhead, ABB

deals.Description: Plair SA develops and commercializes advanced laser-based instruments for real-time microbial, allergen, and bioaerosol detection. Their systems increase efficiencies and automation in environmental monitoring for improved risk management.

PAVE Space is a Swiss space infrastructure company developing orbital transfer vehicles (OTVs) to move satellites rapidly between orbits. Their technology aims to significantly reduce satellite deployment times and enhance in-space logistics.
deals.Investors: Visionaries Club, Creandum, Lombard Odier Investment Managers, Atlantic Labs, Sistafund, b2venture, ACE Investment Partners, Ilavska Vuillermoz Capital, Pareto Ventures, Motier Ventures

deals.Description: Zurich-based AI and data-driven customer intelligence company developing Elaiia, an Artificial Customer Intelligence platform that simulates customer behavior. The platform generates synthetic populations, or AI twins, that mirror real-world audiences using large-scale behavioral, survey, and transaction data.
deals.Investors: Cusp Capital, Auxxo Female Catalyst Fund
deals.Founders: Dr. Cindy Candrian, Dr. Anne Scherer

deals.Description: A deep-tech startup focused on copper-based interconnect technology to redefine the AI infrastructure landscape. Its Chord signaling technology boosts bandwidth and cuts power usage for data centers.

Lugano-based company providing AI solutions in production environments, offering strategic AI transformation consulting and co-developing advanced AI solutions. They also offer ready-to-use tools like their PrivateAI Suite.

Zurich-based provider of an ingredients discovery and data platform for the personal care industry. The company plans to launch new industry-specific AI-agents and deepen its data platform with PIM and MDM capabilities.

AlpineAI is a Swiss startup developing a sovereign AI platform designed for regulated industries. The company aims to scale its platform to meet the specific compliance and security needs of these sectors.

AI platform for insurance advisors, automating administrative workflows and improving efficiency. It records and analyzes advisory conversations to automate tasks like meeting notes and follow-ups, while keeping sensitive data on Swiss-based infrastructure.
deals.Founders: Gilles Dewarrat, Romain Souyris, Charly Hayoz

deals.Description: Platform for early immunogenicity risk detection in biologics. It combines human-relevant biology with scalable AI design to predict and redesign antibody sequences, helping reduce anti-drug antibody risk and prevent costly late-stage failures.
deals.Founders: Lucas Schaus, Punit Mehra, Anatol Ehrlich, Christian Vahlensieck
